item.title: ALLOPURINOL
item.description:
DrugBank ID: db00437
DrugCentral: allopurinol
Synonymous :1,5-dihydro-4h-pyrazolo(3,4-d)pyrimidin-4-one | 1,5-dihydro-4h-pyrazolo(3,4-d)pyrimidine-4-one | 1h-pyrazolo(3,4-d)pyrimidin-4-ol | 4-hpp | 4-hydroxy-1h-pyrazolo(3,4-d)pyrimidine | 4-hydroxy-3,4-pyrazolopyrimidine | 4-hydroxypyrazolo(3,4-d)pyrimidine | 4-hydroxypyrazolopyrimidine | 4-hydroxypyrazolyl(3,4-d)pyrimidine | 4’-hydroxypyrazolol(3,4-d)pyrimidine | 4h-pyrazolo(3,4-d)pyrimidin-4-one | allopurinol | allopurinolum | alopurinol


Drug Sentece Context


Table 1. Analysis of context sentence of allopurinol gene in 3 abstracts.

pmid sentence
32799423 The majority of the other medications decreased ACE2 expression to variable degrees with allopurinol and cisplatin causing the most noticeable downregulation. […] The expression level of TMPRSS2 was increased with a number of medications, such as diclofenac, furosemide, and dexamethasone, whereas other medications, such as allopurinol, suppressed the expression of this gene.
